/usr/bin/cc -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/compiz/src=/usr/src/debug/compiz -flto=auto -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/gtk-window-decorator.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/blurprops.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/events.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/forcequit.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/tooltip.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/decorator.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/gwd-settings-xproperty-storage.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/gwd-theme.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/gwd-theme-cairo.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gtk-window-decorator.dir/gwd-theme-metacity.c.o" -o gtk-window-decorator -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz libgtk_window_decorator_settings.a libgtk_window_decorator_settings_storage_gsettings.a -lm -lmetacity -lXrender -lX11 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
